result: The raw survey datasets have been cleaned and preprocessed into a single analysis-ready file. The parental NS-SEC occupational class variables for five waves (age 14 to 18) were derived by collapsing fractional sub-category codes to their major categories (1-17), mapping specific missing values (e.g., -98 to -3), and applying the standardized missing-value scheme. The final output containing NSID and the ten target variables (nssecma14, nssecpa14, nssecma15, nssecpa15, nssecma16, nssecpa16, nssecma17, nssecpa17, nssecma18, nssecpa18) has been written to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
